features.name: Authentication
features.description: User registration and login with JWT token-based authentication

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard showing overall summary and statistics

features.name: Expense Management
features.description: Create, read, update, and delete expenses with categories, payment modes, and operation types

features.name: Expense Dashboard
features.description: Visual dashboard for expense analytics with charts and summaries

features.name: Revenue Management
features.description: Track revenue by client, country, and service with invoice tracking

features.name: Revenue Dashboard
features.description: Visual dashboard for revenue analytics with geography and service breakdowns

features.name: Invoice Management
features.description: Create and manage invoices with GST/TDS calculations, multi-currency support, and PDF generation

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Manage customer information including company details, GST numbers, and addresses

features.name: Item Management
features.description: Manage invoice items with HSN/SAC codes, descriptions, and pricing

features.name: Payment Management
features.description: Track payments for invoices with payment dates, amounts, and payment modes

features.name: Recurring Invoices
features.description: Create and manage recurring invoices that are automatically generated on a schedule

features.name: Recurring Expenses
features.description: Create and manage recurring expenses that are automatically generated on a schedule

features.name: Settings
features.description: Manage application settings including company information and user preferences

features.name: HSN/SAC Management
features.description: Manage HSN/SAC codes for tax calculations

features.name: API Service
features.description: Centralized API service for making HTTP requests to the backend

features.name: Layout Component
features.description: Main layout component with navigation sidebar and header

features.name: Tax Utilities
features.description: Utility functions for tax calculations including GST (CGST, SGST, IGST) and TDS

features.name: Email Service
features.description: Email service for sending notifications using nodemailer
